title: Bad Interface / API Design
summary: Interfaces are inconsistent, overly complex, too chatty, or leak internal implementation details.
inspection_goal: Inspect dependency surfaces and communication patterns for fragile, overly coupled, or leaky interfaces.
primary_signals: Many consumers depend on unstable or low-level interface nodes
Chatty dependency chains between the same components
Consumers depend on many fine-grained endpoints or symbols
Interface nodes expose implementation-specific dependencies downstream
inspection_questions: Which interfaces attract many consumers while changing frequently?
Are dependencies too granular or too chatty?
Do interfaces expose internal implementation concepts?
Do consumers depend on details instead of stable contracts?
recommendation_patterns: Reduce chatty interactions with coarser operations
Hide internals behind explicit DTOs or adapter layers

severity_guidance.high: Key interfaces are both widely consumed and structurally leaky.
severity_guidance.medium: Some interface surfaces are noisy or unstable but containable.
severity_guidance.low: Most interfaces are clear, with a few awkward integration points.
